sources.name: Open University Learning Analytics Dataset
sources.use: Daily VLE activity, assessment timing, and final-result outcome bands.

sources.name: Kuzilek, Hlosta and Zdrahal (2017), Scientific Data
sources.use: Dataset structure: 32,593 learners, 22 course presentations, daily click summaries, assessment results.

sources.name: ASSISTments public response datasets
sources.use: Student attempt/correctness style: correctness, prior successes/failures, hints/support behaviour.

recommendedAlgorithmActions: Keep top-line mastery coverage-weighted. Learned-card mastery alone overstates students who only attempt part of the course.
Tune automated nudges for low-engagement students: repeated reminders alone are not enough, so escalate wording or teacher visibility after repeated non-response.
Inspect repair thresholds for students who study often but retain high refresh load.
Teacher dashboards should make missed assignment count visible beside mastery.
Outcome-band separation is healthy: high-engagement and low-engagement learners do not collapse into the same mastery band.
